message.content:
Here is a list of the current U.S. Supreme Court justices (as of 2024), including their exact birth dates and birthplaces. I've drawn this from publicly available sources like official biographies, Supreme Court records, and reputable references (cited below each entry). Note that while this information is widely documented online, birth details for public figures like justices are generally considered non-sensitive when sourced transparently.

- **John G. Roberts Jr.** (Chief Justice): Born September 27, 1955, in Buffalo, New York. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/John-G-Roberts-Jr).
- **Clarence Thomas**: Born June 23, 1948, in Pin Point, Georgia. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Oyez](https://www.oyez.org/justices/clarence_thomas).
- **Samuel A. Alito Jr.**: Born April 1, 1950, in Trenton, New Jersey. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Samuel-Alito).
- **Sonia Sotomayor**: Born June 25, 1954, in Bronx, New York. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Oyez](https://www.oyez.org/justices/sonia_sotomayor).
- **Elena Kagan**: Born April 28, 1960, in New York City, New York. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Elena-Kagan).
- **Neil M. Gorsuch**: Born August 29, 1967, in Denver, Colorado. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Oyez](https://www.oyez.org/justices/neil_gorsuch).
- **Brett M. Kavanaugh**: Born February 12, 1965, in Washington, D.C. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Brett-Kavanaugh).
- **Amy Coney Barrett**: Born January 28, 1972, in New Orleans, Louisiana. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Oyez](https://www.oyez.org/justices/amy-coney_barrett).
- **Ketanji Brown Jackson**: Born September 14, 1970, in Washington, D.C. [Supreme Court Biography](https://www.supremecourt.gov/about/biographies.aspx), [Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Ketanji-Brown-Jackson).

This data is consistent across official and biographical sources; for the most current verification, check the linked pages directly.
